sentences.target: Je prends mon parapluie en sortant.

translations.fr: Je prends mon parapluie en sortant.
translations.en: I'm taking my umbrella as I go out.
translations.de: Ich nehme meinen Regenschirm mit, wenn ich rausgehe.
translations.it: Prendo il mio ombrello quando esco.
translations.ru: Я беру свой зонт, когда выхожу.
translations.he: אני לוקח את המטרייה שלי כשאני יוצא.
translations.vi: Tôi mang theo ô khi ra ngoài.
translations.nl: Ik neem mijn paraplu mee als ik naar buiten ga.
translations.uk: Я беру свою парасольку, коли виходжу.
translations.hi: मैं बाहर जाते समय अपनी छतरी लेता हूँ.
translations.el: Παίρνω την ομπρέλα μου όταν βγαίνω.
translations.nb: Jeg tar med meg paraplyen når jeg går ut.
translations.sv: Jag tar med mig mitt paraply när jag går ut.
translations.cs: Beru si deštník, když jdu ven.
translations.da: Jeg tager min paraply med, når jeg går ud.
translations.fi: Otan sateenvarjon mukaan, kun lähden ulos.
translations.ja: 出かけるとき、傘を持っていきます。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun (1st person singular); functions as the subject of the verb 'prends'.
Finite verb, present indicative (1st person singular) of 'prendre'; main verb of the clause, agrees with 'Je'.
Possessive determiner (1st person singular, masculine singular); modifies 'parapluie' to indicate possession.
Common noun (masculine singular); direct object of 'prends'.
Preposition introducing a gerund construction ('en' + present participle) that marks simultaneity with the main action.
Present participle of 'sortir'; forms the gerund phrase 'en sortant', indicating a concurrent action with an understood subject co-referential to 'Je'.

translations.he: אתה יכול לקחת את המטרייה שלי.
translations.vi: Bạn có thể lấy ô của tôi.
translations.hi: तुम मेरी छतरी ले सकते हो.
translations.el: Μπορείς να πάρεις την ομπρέλα μου.
translations.ja: 私の傘を持っていっていいよ。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun (2nd person singular); subject of 'peux'.
Finite verb, present indicative (2nd person singular) of 'pouvoir'; modal verb expressing ability, selecting the infinitive 'prendre'.
Infinitive verb; complement of the modal 'peux'.
Possessive determiner (1st person singular, masculine singular); modifies 'parapluie'.
Common noun (masculine singular); direct object of the infinitive 'prendre'.

sentences.target: On a perdu un parapluie au parc.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ a pɛʁdy œ̃ paʁaplɥi o paʁk/

translations.fr: On a perdu un parapluie au parc.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ a pɛʁdy œ̃ paʁaplɥi o paʁk/
translations.en: We lost an umbrella in the park.
translations.es: Perdimos un paraguas en el parque.
translations.de: Wir haben im Park einen Regenschirm verloren.
translations.it: Abbiamo perso un ombrello al parco.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在公园丢了一把雨伞。
translations.yue: 我哋喺公園唔見咗一把遮。
translations.vi: Chúng tôi làm mất một cái ô trong công viên.
translations.nl: We zijn een paraplu kwijtgeraakt in het park.
translations.hi: हमने पार्क में एक छतरी खो दी.
translations.nb: Vi mistet en paraply i parken.
translations.id: Kami kehilangan sebuah payung di taman.
translations.sv: Vi tappade ett paraply i parken.
translations.ro: Am pierdut o umbrelă în parc.
translations.da: Vi mistede en paraply i parken.
translations.ja: 公園で傘をなくしました。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun (impersonal/personal 'one/we', 3rd person singular); subject of the auxiliary 'a'.
Auxiliary verb, present indicative (3rd person singular); forms the passé composé with 'perdu'.
Past participle of 'perdre'; main verb in a compound past tense; takes 'un parapluie' as its direct object.
Indefinite article determiner (masculine singular); modifies 'parapluie'.
Common noun (masculine singular); direct object of 'perdu'.
Contraction of preposition 'à' + definite article 'le'; introduces the locative prepositional phrase.
Common noun (masculine singular); object of the preposition 'au'.

sentences.target: Le parapluie rouge est dans l'entrée.

translations.fr: Le parapluie rouge est dans l'entrée.
translations.en: The red umbrella is in the hallway.
translations.es: El paraguas rojo está en el recibidor.
translations.de: Der rote Regenschirm ist im Flur.
translations.pt: O guarda-chuva vermelho está na entrada.
translations.vi: Chiếc ô màu đỏ ở ngay lối vào.
translations.nl: De rode paraplu staat in de gang.
translations.hu: A piros esernyő az előszobában van.
translations.el: Η κόκκινη ομπρέλα είναι στο χολ.
translations.nb: Den røde paraplyen er i gangen.
translations.sv: Det röda paraplyet står i hallen.
translations.da: Den røde paraply er i entréen.
translations.ja: 赤い傘は玄関にあります。

tokens.explanation: Definite article determiner (masculine singular); introduces the noun 'parapluie'.
Common noun (masculine singular); subject of the clause.
Adjective (masculine singular); post-nominal modifier describing 'parapluie'.
Copular auxiliary, present indicative (3rd person singular); links the subject to the locative predicate.
Preposition introducing a prepositional phrase of location.
Noun with elided definite article ('le' → 'l'' before vowel); object of the preposition 'dans', denoting the location.

Le parapluie rouge est dans l'entrée.

en: I'm taking my umbrella as I go out.
We lost an umbrella in the park.
The red umbrella is in the hallway.
